positive: A stylized, symmetrical design featuring a majestic, glowing phoenix rising from vibrant, geometric bursts of energy. The phoenix is rendered in deep crimson and gold gradients, characterized by sharp, elegant feather shapes. The background is a clean, minimalist cosmic pattern of swirling nebulae in deep indigo and violet, contrasting sharply with the warm tones of the phoenix. Composition should emphasize a central, powerful silhouette suitable for a t-shirt print, with strong negative space around the subject. Hyper-detailed, vector art style illustration, maximal contrast, vibrant yet sophisticated color palette, high resolution, clean lines, centered composition, flat graphic design aesthetic.
negative: blur, lowres, artifacts, noisy, deformed, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, copyrighted, blurry details
